title: Baseline Conversation-Action Gap
caption: Comparison of compliance rates across standard chat, tool-enabled, and polluted chat baselines. This illustrates the baseline vulnerability levels across different interaction modalities prior to any mitigations.

title: Effectiveness of Inference-Time Mitigations
caption: Impact of proposed mitigations—Execution-Aware CoT, Explicit Rejection Tool, and Production Stakes Prompting—on reducing unsafe compliance compared to the standard tool baseline.

title: Ablation of Execution-Aware Reasoning
caption: An ablation study isolating the effect of 'Execution-Aware' reasoning. It compares standard Chain-of-Thought (without execution focus) against Execution-Aware CoT to demonstrate the necessity of functional outcome evaluation.

title: Model Alignment Convergence
caption: Training history tracking the convergence of the model during the simulated alignment phase, demonstrating the stabilization of internal loss metrics across training epochs.
